_meta.description: Funnel <-> Automation recommended-followup link map. Maps each Skill-6 funnel template to its recommended Skill-44 follow-up automation(s).
_meta.core_principle: Every link is a RECOMMENDED DEFAULT and a RESOURCE — never a rule or a requirement. The template/sequence assists; it never dominates the user's stated desire. Always overridable, mixable, customizable, ignorable.

intent_modes.EXPLICIT_USER_SPEC: User named their own follow-up -> honor it; this map is only an optional reference.
intent_modes.UNSURE_WANTS_SUGGESTION: User is unsure -> suggest the primary follow-up + why, await confirm.
intent_modes.HANDS_OFF_DO_IT_ALL: User said 'just do it' -> auto-build the linked automations (minus any the user overrode).

consumed_by: 06-ghl-install-pages funnel_matcher.step0_match -> emits linked_automations for Skill 44 to build the complete funnel (minus user overrides)

primary_followup.name: Free-Plus-Shipping / Book Post-Purchase + OTO Recovery Follow-Up

secondary_followups.name: Abandoned Cart Recovery Sequence
Abandoned Cart Multichannel Recovery (2-Step Order Form Drop-Off)
Soap Opera Sequence (5-Email Bonding Sequence)

links.why: Free+shipping tripwire -> immediate OTO/ascension follow-up; recover order-form abandons; bond new buyers with a Soap Opera Sequence.
links.group_doctrine: A buyer funnel takes money. The proven default follow-up is post-purchase OTO/ascension + cart-abandon recovery for the order form.

flexibility.principle: RECOMMENDED DEFAULT, never mandatory. The linked automations are a guide and a resource; they must not dominate the user's desire.
flexibility.explicit_user_spec: If the user named their own follow-up, build THAT; this map is an optional reference only — do not impose it.
flexibility.unsure: If the user is unsure, suggest the primary follow-up and explain why, then let them decide.
flexibility.hands_off: If the user said 'just do it', build the primary (and, if desired, the secondary) automations from these defaults.
flexibility.always: Overridable, mixable, customizable, ignorable. Any automation the user overrides is dropped from the auto-build.
